title: Yijing Hexagram 47: Kun (Oppression)
description: Hexagram 47 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 47 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Oppression. Success. Perseverance. The great man brings about good fortune. No blame. When one has something to say, it is not believed.
